name: io.github.muvon/mcp-binance-futures
description: MCP server for Binance USDT-M Futures trading. Provides tools for market data, account state, order management, and position/margin control — gives an LLM everything it needs to monitor, place, and manage futures trades.

environmentVariables.description: Binance API Key with Futures trading enabled
environmentVariables.name: BINANCE_API_KEY
